name: Flashlight

notes.en: Tap Turn on to fill the screen with bright white light; tap anywhere on the lit screen to turn it off. Tap SOS to blink the international Morse SOS pattern instead — a small Stop SOS button stays reachable while it runs.
notes.ru: Нажмите «Включить», чтобы залить экран ярким белым светом; коснитесь экрана, чтобы выключить. Нажмите SOS, чтобы мигать сигналом SOS азбукой Морзе — во время сигнала остаётся доступна маленькая кнопка «Остановить SOS».

notes: Classic screen-as-flashlight trick: fills the display with solid white at maximum brightness rather than controlling any real hardware LED/torch, and cannot change the OS's actual screen-brightness setting (the off-state UI says so). SOS mode blinks the international Morse SOS pattern at a fixed rate chosen to stay under common photosensitive-epilepsy flash-rate guidance (2.5 flashes/second on the dot phase, under the ~3/second threshold WCAG 2.3.1 uses) — see app.js's SOS_TIMING constant for exact values and do not speed them up. Requests a screen wake lock while the light or SOS is active, where supported (navigator.wakeLock), and releases it when turned off; feature-detected, so unsupported browsers just skip it.
